action.reasoning: Observation: 8-epoch SegFormer-B5 improved from 0.3948 to 0.4445 mIoU, and 6 more epochs took ~25 minutes, so training is still productive with ample budget. Analysis: continued fine-tuning should improve ADE20K mIoU; additionally, test-time flip augmentation and a slightly larger default inference scale are low-risk ways to improve validation mIoU, though evaluation will be slower but still affordable. Decision: patch predict.py to use default short_side=768 with flip TTA, train 18 additional epochs from the 8-epoch checkpoint at a lower LR, then submit evaluation.
